NAVAREA XIX 126/18
BARENTS SEA
1. MISSILE AND ARTILLERY FIRING 06 TO 09 NOV 0500 TO 1900 UTC
IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A.   71-35.0N 029-02.0E
B.   71-35.0N 030-14.0E 
C.   71-15.0N 030-14.0E 
D.   71-15.0N 029-02.0E
2. AREA IS DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION
3. COASTAL WARNING MURMANSK 324 AND NORWEGIAN COASTAL WARNING 611 REFERS
4. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 092000 UTC NOV 18
